info.title: Jira
info.description: Jira Cloud connector with MCP tools and typed REST operations covering issues, comments, worklogs, watchers, votes, links, attachments, filters, projects, versions, components, users, groups, statuses, boards, sprints, and epics.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration with Jira.

get.description: Returns all projects visible to the user.

post.description: Search issues using JQL (enhanced search). Returns one Jira page (up to 100 records) by default. Set `limit` to opt into server-side pagination across multiple pages, or pass `nextPageToken` to manually resume from a previous response.
Create a new issue.

get.description: Get an issue by ID or key.

put.description: Update an issue by ID or key.

get.description: List comments for an issue.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first comment to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of comments to return

post.description: Add a comment to an issue.

get.description: List available transitions for an issue.

post.description: Transition an issue to a new status.

get.description: Returns all issue types visible to the user.
Get project roles for a project.
Get statuses for a project.
Returns a list of all issue fields.
Get a user by accountId.
Search users visible to the caller.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first item to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

get.description: List users assignable to issues in the specified project.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Substring matched against display name and email address

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session ID used to associate the request with a session

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first user to return (zero-based)

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return (1-1000, defaults to 50)

parameters.name: actionDescriptorId
parameters.description: Workflow transition ID used to limit users by transition permissions

parameters.name: recommend
parameters.description: Whether to use the recommendations service

get.description: Search Jira issue filters visible to the user.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter by owner Atlassian account ID

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Filter by group ID shared with

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter by project ID shared with

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order results by field (e.g. name, -name, owner, favourite_count)

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first item to return (zero-based)

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of filters to return (defaults to 50)

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to expand (e.g. description,owner,jql,sharePermissions)

get.description: Get the status of a long-running asynchronous task.

post.description: Cancel a long-running asynchronous task that has not yet completed.

get.description: List the Atlassian sites (resources) the authenticated user has access to.
Get a single comment on an issue.

put.description: Update an existing comment on an issue.

delete.description: Delete a comment from an issue.

put.description: Assign an issue to a user. Send accountId, '-1' for the default assignee, or null to clear the assignee.

get.description: Get the editable fields and allowed values for an issue.

post.description: Send an email notification about an issue to the configured recipients.

get.description: Return the list of watchers for an issue.

post.description: Add a watcher to an issue. Send the accountId as a JSON string (e.g. "557058:...").

schema.description: Atlassian account ID of the user to add as a watcher

delete.description: Remove a watcher from an issue.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Atlassian account ID of the watcher to remove

get.description: Return vote information for an issue.

post.description: Cast a vote for the current user on an issue.

delete.description: Withdraw the current user's vote on an issue.

post.description: Create a link between two issues.

get.description: Get a single issue link by ID.
Return the available issue link types in the Jira instance.
List worklogs for an issue.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first worklog to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of worklogs to return

post.description: Add a worklog entry to an issue.

parameters.name: notifyUsers
parameters.description: Whether to send notifications about the worklog change

post.description: Create multiple issues in a single request.
Fetch multiple issues by ID or key in one call.

put.description: Archive issues by ID or key.

post.description: Create a new JQL filter.

get.description: Get a single filter by ID.
Return filters owned by the current user.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to expand

parameters.name: includeFavourites
parameters.description: Include favourite filters in the result

get.description: Return the current user's favourite filters.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to expand

put.description: Mark a filter as a favourite for the current user.

delete.description: Remove a filter from the current user's favourites.

get.description: Get a project by ID or key.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to expand (description,issueTypes,lead,projectKeys,url)

get.description: Search projects with paging and filters.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Substring matched against project name or key

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first project to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Order results by field (e.g. category, name, key, lastIssueUpdatedTime)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by permission action (view, browse, edit)

get.description: Return all versions for a project.

post.description: Create a project version.

get.description: Get a project version by ID.
Return all components for a project.

post.description: Create a project component.

get.description: Get a component by ID.

parameters.name: moveIssuesTo
parameters.description: If set, move issues that had this component to the named component

get.description: Find groups by name (picker-style).

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of groups to return

get.description: Return members of a group.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first member to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of members to return

get.description: List all statuses in the Jira instance.

post.description: Attach a file to an issue. Send the file content as a base64-encoded string; the connector converts it to multipart/form-data internally. Maximum size is 10 MB after decoding.

get.description: Get attachment metadata by ID.
List Jira Software boards visible to the user.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first board to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of boards to return

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by board type (scrum, kanban, simple)

parameters.name: projectKeyOrId
parameters.description: Filter boards by project key or ID

get.description: Get a board by ID.
Get the configuration of a board.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first issue to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of issues to return

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Get issues in the backlog of a board.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first issue to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of issues to return

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Get projects associated with a board.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first project to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first sprint to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of sprints to return

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state (future, active, closed; comma-separate for multiple)

post.description: Create a new sprint on a Scrum board.

get.description: Get a sprint by ID.

post.description: Partially update a sprint (name, state, startDate, endDate, goal).

delete.description: Delete a sprint. Any issues are moved back to the backlog.

get.description: Get issues in a sprint.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first issue to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of issues to return

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

post.description: Move issues into a sprint.
Move issues out of any sprint and back into the backlog.

get.description: List epics on a board.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first epic to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of epics to return

get.description: Get an epic by ID or key.
Get issues in an epic.

parameters.name: startAt
parameters.description: Index of the first issue to return

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of issues to return

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

post.description: Move issues into an epic.
Remove issues from their current epic (move them to no epic).

nextPageToken.description: Cursor returned by a previous Search Issues call. Use to manually fetch the next page when `limit` is not set.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per Jira page (1-100). Defaults to Jira's server default.

limit.description: Optional total cap. When set, the connector pages through Jira automatically until this many records are collected or no more pages remain.

isLast.description: True when no more pages are available from Jira.

nextPageToken.description: Cursor to pass back as `nextPageToken` to fetch the next page. Null/absent when `isLast` is true.

fetched.description: Number of issues returned in this response (after applying `limit`, if any).

body.description: Comment body in Jira document format
Comment body in Jira document format

subtask.description: Whether this issue type is a subtask

ProjectRoles.description: Map of role names to role URLs

favourite.description: Whether the filter is a favourite of the user

favouritedCount.description: Number of users who have favourited the filter

viewUrl.description: URL to view the filter in Jira

searchUrl.description: URL to run the filter via the REST API

isLast.description: Whether this is the last page

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items returned per page

startAt.description: Index of the first item returned

total.description: Total number of filters matching the query

status.description: Task status (ENQUEUED, RUNNING, COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCEL_REQUESTED, CANCELLED, DEAD)

submittedBy.description: ID of the user that submitted the task

submitted.description: Timestamp when the task was submitted (epoch ms)

started.description: Timestamp when the task started (epoch ms)

finished.description: Timestamp when the task finished (epoch ms)

lastUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last task status update (epoch ms)

id.description: Resource (site) ID, used as the cloudId

accountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the assignee. Use '-1' for the project default assignee, or null to unassign.

to.description: Notification recipients block (reporter, assignee, watchers, voters, users, groups)

isWatching.description: Whether the current user is watching

hasVoted.description: Whether the current user has voted

comment.description: Optional comment to add when creating the link
Worklog comment in Jira document format

timeSpentSeconds.description: Time spent in seconds (alternative to timeSpent)

comment.description: Worklog comment in Jira document format

issueIdsOrKeys.description: Issue IDs or keys to fetch (up to 100)

projectId.description: Project ID this version belongs to
Project ID this version belongs to

assigneeType.description: Default assignee type (PROJECT_DEFAULT, COMPONENT_LEAD, PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED)

isAssigneeTypeValid.description: Whether the assignee type is valid

assigneeType.description: Default assignee type (PROJECT_DEFAULT, COMPONENT_LEAD, PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED)

contentBase64.description: File content encoded as base64. Maximum 10 MB after decoding.

contentType.description: MIME type (e.g. application/pdf). Defaults to application/octet-stream.

state.description: Sprint state (future, active, closed). Setting to active starts the sprint.

issues.description: Issue IDs or keys to move

scopes.read:jira-work write:jira-work read:jira: Read and write Jira work, and read Jira user data
